source_jobs.title: Application Support Analyst
source_jobs.description:
About Us:
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. The product market fit is excellent, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
 
Our diverse team shares a collective passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a desire to create the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal development. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
 
Overview:
We are seeking an experienced Senior Application Support Analyst with strong customer-facing experience to join our team and support our airline SaaS solution that automates critical airline operations. In this role, you will manage high-impact customer inquiries, ensure swift responses across our organization, and deliver exceptional service to leading airline clients. Your technical troubleshooting expertise, strong communication skills, and ability to handle high-pressure situations will be crucial to your success.

source_jobs.title: Delivery Lead - Deploy
source_jobs.description:
About Us
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of products that has already achieved significant traction in a large global market. Our customers are global airlines operating in complex, high-stakes environments where delivery quality, product quality, and customer trust matter deeply.
We operate in stealth mode during this growth phase. Our team is united by a passion for solving hard problems, building great products, and creating the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our culture is built on trust, collaboration, high standards, and continuous growth.
 
Overview
As a Senior Delivery Lead – Deploy, you will lead complex, customer-facing enterprise SaaS implementations for top-tier airline customers. You will own delivery outcomes across the full implementation lifecycle, from kickoff through go-live, stabilization, and transition to BAU.
This is a hands-on senior delivery leadership role, not a PMO coordination role. You will be expected to step into ambiguity, establish structure quickly, drive alignment across customer and internal teams, and maintain confidence with senior stakeholders throughout the implementation. You must be able to manage scope, challenge assumptions, hold the line when needed, and protect product integrity while still building strong customer trust.
Success in this role requires maturity, judgment, executive presence, and strong critical-path management in a fast-paced environment.

source_jobs.title: Implementation Consultant
source_jobs.description:
About Us:
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. The product market fit is excellent, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
 
Our diverse team shares a collective passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a desire to create the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal development. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
Overview
As an Implementation Consultant, you will help our airline clients to implement our software, and to get the most value out of it during active usage. You will work with clients on requirements gathering and analysis as well as hands-on software configuration, testing, end user training, and support. Using extensive product knowledge and good communication and relationship-building skills, you will provide white-glove service, establishing trust and credibility quickly and acting as an advisor throughout the client’s use of the software.

source_jobs.title: Office Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
Air-tek Inc. is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that has already achieved a significant share of a huge global opportunity. The product market fit is excellent, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
 
Our diverse team shares a collective passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a desire to create the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal development. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
We are seeking a highly organized and proactive individual to serve as our Office Coordinator. This role position is responsible for managing day-to-day operations of our office environment. The ideal candidate is a people-oriented multitasker who thrives in a dynamic setting and enjoys wearing multiple hats while contributing to a positive workplace culture. 
 
This is a part-time role working 3 days a week (Monday, Wednesday and Friday) from the office.

source_jobs.title: Product Owner
source_jobs.description:
About Us
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. The product-market fit is excellent, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
Our diverse team shares a collective passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a desire to create the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal development. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
Overview
As a Product Manager at Air-tek, you’ll play a key role in delivering high-impact enterprise software to top-tier global airlines. Working closely with a cross-functional scrum team, you will translate product vision into well-defined user stories and ensure the team delivers high-quality, scalable features in alignment with customer needs and business priorities.
 
In this hybrid role based in Toronto, you will be expected to work a minimum of three days per week in the office (Monday, Wednesday and Friday)  to support agile ceremonies, collaboration with stakeholders, and rapid iteration

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Us
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company redefining how airlines operate through intelligent automation and modern, scalable systems. Our suite of products has already captured a significant share of a massive global market - and we’re only in the early innings. 
 
While our customers know our name, we intentionally operate in stealth mode as we continue to build, innovate, and scale globally. 
 
We’re a team of builders, problem-solvers, and innovators passionate about making airline operations seamless, data-driven, and passenger-centric. Based in Toronto, our culture thrives on trust, collaboration, accountability, and continuous improvement - where every engineer can experiment, own, and make real impact.

source_jobs.title: Software Developer
source_jobs.description:
About Us
 
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. Our product-market fit is strong, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
 
Our diverse team shares a passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a vision to reshape the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal growth. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
The Role
 
We’re looking for Software Developers who are excited to build high-quality, production-grade software and grow their technical ownership over time. 
 
As a Software Developer, you’ll work on core product features and services that power real-world airline operations. You’ll contribute to system design, build scalable APIs and integrations, and collaborate closely with senior engineers, QA, and product partners to deliver reliable solutions. 
 
This role is ideal for engineers who are past the “just following tickets” phase and ready to own meaningful components, make technical decisions with guidance, and continuously level up their craft.

source_jobs.title: Software Development Engineer in Test
source_jobs.description:
About Us
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company offering a powerful suite of
innovative products that have already captured a significant share of a massive
global market. With strong product-market fit, demand is growing rapidly. While
our global customers know us well, we operate in stealth mode during this
exciting growth phase.

Our diverse team is united by a passion for solving complex problems, a drive to
innovate, and a commitment to reshaping the passenger-centric travel industry.
Headquartered in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration,
product excellence, and continuous personal growth. We love what we do and
support each other every step of the way.
The Role
We’re looking for a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) who goes
beyond writing tests - someone who delivers robust automation frameworks,
drives testing strategy, and empowers engineering teams to deliver high-quality
software at scale.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in autonomy, influencing testing
strategy, and has a proven track record of building automation capabilities from
the ground up. You’ll spend your time primarily on automation and framework
development with some manual exploratory testing as required/while automated
frameworks sufficiently mature.

source_jobs.title: Sr Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Us
 
Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. The product market fit is excellent, and customers are lining up to buy. Although our global customers know us, we intentionally operate in stealth mode during this growth phase.
 
Our diverse team shares a collective passion for solving complex problems with a drive to innovate and a desire to create the passenger-centric travel industry. Based in Toronto, our inclusive culture is built on trust, collaboration, delivering a great product, and continuous personal development. We love what we do, and we support the team around us.
 
About the Team
 
The Platform Engineering team is a highly collaborative group of software engineers committed to building, scaling, and maintaining the foundations on which other teams can build Air-Tek's software solutions on. We focus one developing secure, scalable and efficient infrastructure, leveraging modern development practices. Our impact reaches broadly across the company, working closely with operations, support, product, and other engineering teams to achieve Air-tek's company objectives.
 
As a Platform Development Engineer, you will play a key role in the design, development, and operation of our core platform services, helping us deliver powerful and reliable infrastructure solutions to support the growing needs of our products.

We’re looking for a Staff Software Developer who can own big technical decisions, build scalable systems, and help shape our engineering culture as we grow. You’ll work across the stack, solve complex problems, and turn ambiguity into clear direction. This is a high‑impact role with broad autonomy.

source_jobs.description:

Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a powerful suite of unique products that have already achieved a significant share of a huge global market. Overview
We are actively searching for a Solution Architect who will play a crucial role in implementing technological solutions to address complex business problems. Given that we build and deploy enterprise software, we are looking for someone who has experience supporting the implementation and integration of our SaaS platform.

notes: Air-tek is a Canadian-based software company with a strong focus on engineering and product development.
